Exam Schedule Conflict Applications / 2025-2026 Fall Semester Midterm

Exam Schedule Conflict Applications / 2025-2026 Fall Semester Midterm

Students whose midterm exams overlap are required to apply for the

and indicate

both conflicting exams

in their make-up exam petition.

If one of the conflicting exams belongs to

another faculty

attend that faculty’s exam first

.

Access to the Online Petition System:

https://online.uskudar.edu.tr/

You can log in to the system using your

student e-mail address and password

that you use on

ALMS/STIX

platforms.
